About Stellar Help Disclaimer

Stellar Wallet Features

Fast and cheap

Send and receive XLM in seconds with minimal fees.

Non-custodial Wallet

Private keys stay with you. We never store them.

No Registration Required

Start instantly – no signup, no KYC, no hassle.

Direct Access

Connect straight to the Stellar blockchain without intermediaries.

Secure & Private

End-to-end encryption ensures your data stays yours.

100% Responsive

Use on any device – desktop, tablet, or mobile.

Security & Transparency

Security

With our Stellar wallet, your secret keys stay with you – we never store your data. Thanks to strong encryption, you can manage your assets with complete peace of mind.

Transparency

We believe trust starts with openness. Our Stellar web wallet is fully open-source, so you can see exactly how everything works. Feel free to explore – transparency is at the heart of what we do!

Testimonials

“I’m on the move a lot, and this wallet just makes it easy. No need to install anything, I just log in wherever I am – phone, someone’s laptop, whatever. It’s super handy when you’re halfway across the world and need access fast.”

– Anna K.

“The fact that the private key stays with me — that’s what sold me. I’ve had bad experiences before with platforms holding the keys. Here, I know it’s mine and only mine. That’s a big deal for me.”

– Miguel R.

“Honestly? I hate cluttered apps. This one’s clean, simple, and it just works. Didn’t even read anything – opened it, clicked around, and done. Can’t say that about most other crypto wallets I’ve tried.”

– Lisa M.

“At first, I thought web wallets were kinda sketchy. Like, no installation? But I’ve been using this one for over 3 years now. Not once have I had an issue. No hacks, no lockouts – nothing. Solid stuff.”

– Alex D.

Stellar Wallet: Your Gateway to Seamless XLM Transactions

Looking for a Stellar Lumen Wallet that combines speed, simplicity, and security? The Stellar Web Wallet offers a streamlined solution for XLM holders, providing direct, non-custodial access to the Stellar blockchain. With a user-friendly interface and efficient transaction handling, it’s the ideal XLM Wallet for those who value control, security, and seamless blockchain interaction.

Stellar Wallet Features

There's no need to complicate things – Stellar Online Wallet was designed as the easiest way to transfer money online, and that's what our XLM web wallet does.

  • Safely store Stellar lumens.
  • Make near-instant transfers in XLM at almost no cost (tiny fraction of a cent).
  • Interact directly with Stellar blockchain.
  • Check your balance in real time, 24/7.
  • Create as many Stellar wallets as you need without limits.
  • No identity verification or KYC procedures required.
  • Non-custodial wallet.
  • Auto-sync: seamlessly switch between devices and find your balance updated.
  • 100% responsive: use on any device.

Focusing on Your Security

We wanted to build not just any wallet for XLM, but the best Stellar wallet on the market. That's why your security was our key priority. Our Stellar wallet is 100% non-custodial. Your secret key always stays in your possession. Many other XLM wallets are custodial, meaning you have to entrust them with your private key. This may seem convenient, but it's also highly risky. If the company's server is hacked, your key falls into criminals' hands, along with your lumens.

With our Stellar web wallet, you retain full control over your funds – as well as the responsibility for your key. When you generate a new Stellar wallet, you'll be provided with a key and seed phrase. Save them in several copies in different locations, preferably offline. The best way is to print them out and keep them where you can find them – but nobody else will.

Designed for Daily Use

Our goal was to make a simple and elegant wallet that you will want to use every day. It's not overloaded with unnecessary features, unlike many other Stellar wallets. Everything you need is on the same screen, and any operation takes only a few clicks or taps. Even if your internet is slow, you'll find that our XLM web wallet performs perfectly.

We've also invested a lot of effort into responsive design. Our web wallet looks and works equally well on any screen size. Generate a new Stellar wallet now and check for yourself!

Please visit our help page if you need assistance getting started with Stellar Wallet.

For developers

If you are a blockchain developer, you should take a close look at Stellar, too. You can write smart contracts on Stellar, just like you would on Ethereum. In fact, it's much easier and cheaper to build complete dApps on Stellar. Any Stellar-based asset can be stored and used in our lumen wallet.

Creating a new asset takes only a few minutes and is virtually free. You can launch a new blockchain project and raise funds using our web wallet. This is the easiest way to crowdfund a company!

Why Lumens?

Stellar (XLM) is one of the world's TOP-20 largest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization – and also one of the fastest. Transactions usually take a few seconds (never more than 15 seconds). Compare this to at least 5 minutes for Ethereum and up to an hour for Bitcoin. Each XLM transfer costs just 0.00001 XLM, regardless of the size in bytes. This makes Stellar a perfect blockchain for micropayments, fundraising, and smart contract deployment.

If you are looking for a web wallet to hodl your crypto investments, then our web wallet is a great option. XLM is strongly undervalued right now, and its potential for growth is huge. So you'd be wise to buy some XLM, transfer them into our web wallet, and store them for at least 6 months. Everyone is talking about investing in Bitcoin, but an investment in XLM can be a better and cheaper choice!

Paying for Products and Services

Thousands of businesses already accept XLM as a payment option. With our Stellar web wallet, you can pay for everything – from web hosting to design items.

Create a new XLM wallet now and discover the easiest way to store and transfer your Stellar lumens!

FAQ

A Stellar wallet is your digital vault for assets on the Stellar network. If you want to store XLM and make transactions with it (send and receive), you can't do without a Stellar wallet.

With our service it is very easy to create an XLM wallet. Click the Creating a new Stellar wallet button on the main page. Generate and save the public and secret keys of your XLM wallet in a safe place. If the process of creating an XLM wallet still causes you difficulties, please use the help page.

Refilling your wallet with 1 XLM to activate it may look strange at first glance. Other networks don't have a similar rule. However, this is the Stellar network's way of protecting itself from spam. To be active, each XLM wallet must have a minimum balance – a sort of collateral to keep the network running smoothly.

If your secret key is compromised, your funds and access to your XLM wallet are at risk. The same is true if it is lost. Our advice: copy your secret key to a safe place, preferably to an offline medium like a flash drive, and print it out on paper. Make sure that no one else has access to the key! If this does happen, immediately transfer all funds to another Stellar wallet.

Unfortunately, there is nothing you can do in this case. We do not store users' keys just for security reasons, but this imposes additional responsibility on the owner of the Stellar wallet. That's why backing up the secret key is so important.
